title: CodeGrind: DSA Practice Meets AI Guided Learning
summary: Show how CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style problems with Azure OpenAI assistance and a cyberpunk-tuned UI to boost practice and learning outcomes.
core_message: CodeGrind combines structured DSA challenges, real-time code execution, and AI-guided problem-solving to accelerate learning. Users tackle LeetCode-style problems in a game-like environment with immediate feedback and scalable AI help.
cta: Try a sample challenge with AI help now or sign in to continue practicing with personalized guidance.
visual_brief: Static, high-contrast UI mockup showing code editor, problem panel, and AI assistant alongside a cyberpunk-styled CodeGrind interface; include subtle leaderboard hints and a prominent 'Start Challenge' button.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
